title: rhodax montanus
side_effects: Rhodax montanus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals. Overuse or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to headaches, fatigue, and insomnia. In rare cases, improper use of Rhodax montanus may also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory issues. Furthermore, it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Rhodax montanus, especially for pregnant or breastfeeding women, as its effects on the fetus or baby are not well-documented.
